summary: SFXManager audit: 6/8 checks PASS. MEDIUM: 7 caller sounds not registered (silent fail). LOW: amb_iles missing for 8th biome.

checks.name: >=30 procedural sounds registered
checks.detail: 57 sounds in _generate_all_sounds() names array: 19 in SFXRecipes + 38 in SFXRecipesAmbient. Well above bible requirement of 30+.

checks.name: Zero audio file references (.wav/.ogg/.mp3)
checks.detail: Fully procedural: SFXRecipes + SFXRecipesAmbient generate AudioStreamWAV via PCM math. No file loads.

checks.name: Public API: play() / play_varied() exist
checks.detail: play(name, pitch=1.0), play_varied(name, variation=0.1), play_ui_click(), play_biome_ambient(biome_key). NOTE: bible mentions 'play_sfx/stop_sfx' but actual API is play()/play_varied() — pool cycling replaces stop_sfx. Not a bug.

checks.name: No Godot 3 deprecations
checks.detail: Uses AudioStreamPlayer (G4), AudioStreamWAV (G4), linear_to_db() (G4). No yield(), no .connect legacy syntax.

checks.name: 100% gen_ method coverage for registered sounds
checks.detail: All 57 names in the names array have matching gen_NAME() methods in SFXRecipes (19) or SFXRecipesAmbient (38). Zero silent-skip sounds.

checks.name: No caller sounds missing from registry
checks.detail: 7 sound names called via SFXManager.play() in game code but NOT in _generate_all_sounds(). They silently skip (graceful fail, no crash). UX degradation at key moments.

checks.name: All 8 biome ambient sounds present
checks.detail: 7/8 biome ambients registered. Missing: amb_iles (iles_celtes biome). play_biome_ambient('iles') silently fails. Low priority as iles_celtes is a late-game biome (score 45+).

invariants_verified: No audio file loads (procedural-only system) PASS
Pool size 6 = safe for concurrent sounds PASS
SFXManager.play() graceful-fail on unknown name PASS

bugs_found.title: 7 sound names called but not registered in SFXManager
bugs_found.description: card_reveal, confirm, encounter, success, fail, neutral, danger are called in UI/3D scripts but have no gen_ methods. Add to SFXRecipesAmbient + register in _generate_all_sounds() names array.

bugs_found.title: Missing amb_iles for iles_celtes biome
bugs_found.description: 8th biome (iles_celtes) has no ambient sound. gen_amb_iles() needs to be added to SFXRecipesAmbient.

patterns: PAT-037: SFXManager.play() uses graceful-fail (returns if not registered). Callers can reference sounds not yet generated — no crash but silent UX degradation.
PAT-038: Procedural sound coverage drift — as new callers are added (UI, scenes), the gen_ method must be added or the sound stays silent. Audit caller list vs names array each sprint.
